notes: Manual GSD loop was used because scripts/programming-loop.mjs and scripts/tdd-gate.mjs are not present in this worktree.
This PR is scoped to issue #43 and does not include the broader connector CLI research package.
Agent contracts are isolated under .agents/agentic-delivery and role specs are grouped by functional area and type under .agents.
CodeRabbit review disposition is now part of the post-implementation workflow.

CodeRabbit follow-up review now waits for automatic incremental review when active and uses manual review only for new unreviewed commits when automatic review is paused, disabled, skipped, rate-limit retry is due, or auto-paused.
Root AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md now point agents at the same issue-first and CodeRabbit review rules.
gsd-programming-loop is mandatory for implementation and behavior-changing agent work, with manual-GSD fallback recording only when local GSD scripts are unavailable.
Parent issue and stacked sub-PR planning is now part of the workflow for large tasks.
Live issue #44 now has issues #34-#42 attached as sub-issues.
Targeted checks, YAML parsing, secret-looking literal scan, git diff --check, and make verify passed.
